headline: My favorite Govee smart lamps are at their lowest prices ever for Prime Day
summary: Govee smart lamps are heavily discounted for Prime Day. Find budget-friendly alternatives to Philips Hue. Popular models like Table Lamp 2 and Floor Lamp Basic are on sale.

headline: After covering Prime Day for 36 hours over four days, this is the one thing I bought
summary: A tech reporter reveals their surprising Prime Day purchase after 36 hours of coverage. They bought Vampliers, a specialized tool for fixing stripped screws. This practical purchase was the most exciting find amid numerous tech deals.

headline: Our favorite Prime Day gadgets under $100 you don’t need but will really want
summary: Discover irresistible Prime Day gadgets under $100 that you never knew you needed. The sale tempts shoppers with fun, impulse purchases beyond essential tech. From USB-C cables to coffee maker button pushers, find quirky deals.

headline: It’s the last day of Prime Day — here are over 140 great deals to choose from
summary: It's the final day of "Prime Week" with over 140 deals still available. Find discounts on TVs, smart home tech, chargers, and headphones. Act fast as popular items are selling out quickly.

headline: New Warhammer 40,000 Animation Is Almost Entirely From the Perspective of a Single World Eaters Berzerker — and Now I Want a First-Person Chaos Space Marine Game
summary: A new Warhammer 40,000 animation offers a unique first-person perspective. The show focuses on a World Eaters Berzerker, inspiring desire for a first-person Chaos Space Marine game. It gives fans a glimpse of what such a game could be like.

headline: Save 5% on Xbox and PlayStation Gift Cards Before Prime Day Ends
summary: Get 5% off Xbox and PlayStation gift cards. Capitalize on extra savings for planned gaming purchases. Don't miss this Prime Day deal before it expires.

headline: Beat the Summer Heat With This $8.49 Portable Turbo Fan Deal for Amazon Prime Day
summary: Stay cool this summer with an $8.49 portable turbo fan. This Prime Day deal helps you combat rising temperatures affordably. Enjoy a frosty relief from the heat.

headline: Pick Up a Powerful and Infinitely Reusable Cordless Electric Air Duster for $20 During Amazon Prime Day
summary: Grab a cordless electric air duster for just $20 on Prime Day. This powerful tool is infinitely reusable, perfect for keeping your PC clean. Your dusty electronics will thank you for this smart purchase.

headline: US conducts strikes on Iran after attack on cargo ship
summary: The US Central Command confirms strikes on Iran. Targets included missile, drone storage, and coastal radar facilities. This action follows an attack on a cargo ship.

headline: Hottest June day record broken for third day in row as temperature hits 37.3C
summary: A heatwave breaks records, with June experiencing its hottest day for the third consecutive time. Temperatures peaked at 37.3C in Suffolk. Relief from the extreme heat is expected to ease over the weekend.

headline: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920 people as families desperate for news
summary: Devastating earthquakes in Venezuela have killed 920 people. Hundreds are feared trapped under rubble, sparking desperate searches for news. International rescue teams have begun arriving to aid recovery efforts.

headline: Court rules 13 men who allegedly helped rapist drug and abuse wife can be named
summary: A court has ruled that 13 men accused of assisting in a severe case of spousal abuse can be named. The men allegedly helped a rapist drug and abuse his wife over several years. This ruling allows public identification in a high-profile abuse case.
